activities_projects.title: Analytical Research on Regional States
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how regional states emerged after the decline of the Mughal Empire
steps: Research the decline of the Mughal Empire
Identify at least three regional states such as Awadh, Bengal, and Hyderabad
Explain how these states became independent and maintained power
Write a detailed analytical report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops deep understanding of political transformations in eighteenth-century India
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Governance Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare administrative systems of different regional powers
steps: Choose two regional powers such as the Marathas and Sikhs
Study their administrative systems, military organization, and taxation
Prepare a comparative report with a structured table and conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical comparison of governance structures

activities_projects.title: Map-Based Political Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the political geography of eighteenth-century India
steps: Mark regions controlled by major powers such as the Marathas, Sikhs, Jats, and Rajputs
Identify strategic locations such as capitals and trade routes
Write a short analysis explaining how geography influenced political power
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops spatial understanding of political developments

activities_projects.title: Case Study of the Maratha Confederacy
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure and functioning of the Maratha political system
steps: Research the Maratha Confederacy and its leaders
Identify important chiefs and their roles
Explain how the confederacy system worked and maintained power
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops deeper understanding of complex political structures

activities_projects.title: Debate: Causes of Mughal Decline
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the reasons for the decline of the Mughal Empire
steps: Divide the class into groups
Each group prepares arguments explaining different causes of Mughal decline
Conduct a debate discussing political, economic, and military factors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking and argumentation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Source Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret historical records related to eighteenth-century states
steps: Read a short historical extract describing a regional kingdom
Identify key information about governance or society
Write an analysis explaining its historical significance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves ability to interpret historical sources
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and depth of analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Political Network Mind Map
activities_projects.objective: Visualize the relationships between different political powers
steps: Write 'Eighteenth-Century India' at the center
Create branches for Mughal Empire, Marathas, Sikhs, Jats, and Rajputs
Show connections such as alliances, conflicts, or influence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Helps students understand complex political relationships
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of connections and organization (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Leadership Study of Regional Rulers
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate leadership styles of important rulers
steps: Choose two rulers such as Shivaji and Maharaja Ranjit Singh
Study their leadership styles and strategies
Write a comparative analysis explaining their contributions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of leadership in historical contexts
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of analysis and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Economic Policies Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand economic systems of regional states
steps: Research taxation systems such as chauth and sardeshmukhi
Explain how these taxes supported regional powers
Write a short report explaining their economic impact
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands economic foundations of political power
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and research (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Modern Relevance Reflection Essay
activities_projects.objective: Connect historical political changes to modern governance
steps: Identify lessons from eighteenth-century political formations
Explain how regional governance influenced modern Indian administration
Write an essay reflecting on these connections
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages higher-level thinking linking history to modern governance
activities_projects.evaluation: Critical thinking and clarity of ideas (10 marks)
